content: Comparative evaluations of intrinsic curiosity signals (ICM vs RND vs hand-designed curious agents) can be reframed as an active learning problem for memory architecture search, where the agent actively selects which curiosity module to retain in episodic memory based on how much it reduces long-term prediction uncertainty across novel environments. This creates a self-tuning curious agent that outperforms static curiosity modules by leveraging 2024-2025 SOTA active memory retention mechanisms.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
